subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! That which thou didst write was perused, and its contents were fully understood. The Seven Valleys [3.5s]... ...Every person must have an occupation, a trade or a craft, so that he may carry other people's burdens, and not himself be a burden to others.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس آنچه نگاشتی ملاحظه گردید و بر تفصیل اطلاع حاصل شد هفت وادی
subcodes.subjects: @begging; mendicancy; idleness and sloth, @work as worship, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @music and singing, @love of God
